titleStmt.title: SII 7.255: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 255. (A.R. No. 78 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP CLOSE TO THE EAST WALL OF THE TIRTHANKARA-BASTI WITHIN THE SANTISVARA-BASTI AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyāt trailōkyanāthasya
śāśanaṁThe anusvara is engraved below the line.jinaśāśanaṁ . svasti śrī . vijayābhyudaya śālivāhanasakavaruṣa 1544 neya durmmatisaṁvatsa
rada kārttikaśuddha 1 sthiravāradallu geyda kāryya mattappuduṁ yēnūra śāṁtīśvaraśvāmiya cai
tyālayadalli lalitakīrttibhaṭṭārakadēvara priyāgraśiṣyaraha madurakadēviyarāda Aṁmmā
jiyaru puṁjaḷikeya rājyaṁgeyva kāladalli beḷḷariya saṁkara Arasara kumāra kabeyara baḷiya
rāmanātha Arasaru hadinārumaṁdi seṭṭigāraru mūnūra AruvattaĀrumaṁdi yeḷamegoḷagā
da samastahalara muṁdiṭṭu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi māḍida dharmmada vivaraveṁteṁdare .
sāṁtīśvarasvāmige paṁcāmrutadha Abhiṣēka vardhdhamānasvāmiya nirvvāṇakalyāṇada pūje ka
rmmanirjariya nōhi paṁcaparamēṣṭigaḷa Amrutapaḍi Alliya baladabhāgada tīrtthakaraba
stiyalli jīvadayāṣṭamiya nōhi tiṁgaḷige voṁdu sukravāradivasa tapōdhanarugaḷige
Āhāradāna . yiṁtī dharmmagaḷige madurakadēviyarāda Aṁmājiyara hastadalli Ā rāmanā
thaArasaru koṭṭa varaha gadyāṇa 100 Akṣaradallu nūru varahana koṭṭu dhārādattavāgi māḍikoṁ
ḍu neredēvasvavāda kṣētrada vivara . yiṁnūrāḷavaṭṭada māranadukaṭṭada bayalallu Ari Arihi
māreṁba gadde 1 mēgaṇamakaḷiyeṁba gadde 1 mēgaṇa poṁgārttimāreṁba gadde 1 muṁḍitimāreṁba
gadde 1 Aṁtu bayala gadde 4 kke bittuva bīja 30 ttara lkeda mūḍe 20 yidakkuḷḷa teṁkaṇa beṭṭugaḷu
gadde 3 kke bīja mūḍe 4 Ubhayaṁ gadde 7 kke bīja mūḍe 24 kke gēṇi Akki muḍe 50 ttara lekkada
mūḍe 35 kke dharmmavyaya varddhamānasvāmiya nirvvāṇapūjegu śāṁtīśvarana
Abhiṣēkaku Akki muḍe 8 karmmanirjjariya nōhiga Akki mu 9 paṁcaparamēṣṭigaḷa Amruta(pa)
paḍige Akki mūḍe 3 tīrtthakarabasti naḍava jīvadayāṣṭaminōhige Akki mūḍe 5 śukravā
ra tiṁgaḷige voṁdu tapōdhanarugaḷige Āhāradānakke Akki mūḍe 10 Aṁtu Akki mūḍe 35 . yiṁtī darmma
vanu Arasaprati yivaru dēsadavara Ubhayānumatadiṁda māḍidha dharmakke maṁgala mahā śrī
śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.255 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
